ingredients.name: Chicken
ingredients.explanation: High-quality whole protein source, excellent amino acid profile for dogs and cats.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 优质完整蛋白质来源，氨基酸谱优秀，适合猫犬。

ingredients.name: Chicken Meal
ingredients.explanation: Concentrated protein source made from rendered chicken. Higher protein by weight than fresh chicken.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 脱水浓缩鸡肉蛋白，按重量计蛋白质含量高于新鲜鸡肉。

ingredients.name: Chicken By-Product Meal
ingredients.explanation: Made from chicken parts like necks, feet, and organs. Lower quality than named meat meals but still provides protein.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 由鸡脖、鸡爪、内脏等部位制成。品质低于明确命名的肉类，但仍能提供蛋白质。

ingredients.name: Chicken Fat
ingredients.explanation: Natural source of omega-6 fatty acids and linoleic acid. Well-preserved chicken fat is a quality ingredient.
ingredients.explanation_zh: omega-6脂肪酸和亚油酸的天然来源。保存良好的鸡脂肪是优质成分。

ingredients.name: Chicken Liver
ingredients.explanation: Nutrient-dense organ meat rich in iron, vitamin A, and B vitamins. Excellent palatability enhancer.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 营养丰富的内脏肉，富含铁、维生素A和B族维生素。极佳的适口性增强剂。

ingredients.name: Chicken Heart
ingredients.explanation: Quality organ meat high in taurine, essential for cats and beneficial for dogs.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 优质内脏肉，牛磺酸含量高，对猫必需，对犬有益。

ingredients.name: Turkey
ingredients.explanation: Lean, high-quality protein source. Good alternative for pets sensitive to chicken.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 瘦肉型优质蛋白质来源。适合对鸡肉敏感的宠物。

ingredients.name: Turkey Meal
ingredients.explanation: Concentrated turkey protein. Excellent source of amino acids.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 浓缩火鸡蛋白，优质氨基酸来源。

ingredients.name: Duck
ingredients.explanation: Novel protein source, good for pets with common protein allergies. Rich in iron.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 新型蛋白质来源，适合常见蛋白质过敏的宠物。富含铁质。

ingredients.name: Duck Meal
ingredients.explanation: Concentrated duck protein source with high biological value.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 浓缩鸭肉蛋白来源，生物价值高。

ingredients.name: Salmon
ingredients.explanation: Excellent source of omega-3 fatty acids (EPA/DHA), supports skin, coat, and joint health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: omega-3脂肪酸（EPA/DHA）的优质来源，支持皮肤、毛发和关节健康。

ingredients.name: Salmon Meal
ingredients.explanation: Concentrated salmon protein with high omega-3 content. Excellent quality protein source.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 浓缩三文鱼蛋白，omega-3含量高。优质蛋白质来源。

ingredients.name: Salmon Oil
ingredients.explanation: Rich source of EPA and DHA omega-3 fatty acids. Supports brain, skin, coat, and joint health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: EPA和DHA omega-3脂肪酸的丰富来源。支持大脑、皮肤、毛发和关节健康。

ingredients.name: Whitefish
ingredients.explanation: Lean protein source rich in omega-3s. Generally well-tolerated by pets with food sensitivities.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 低脂蛋白质来源，富含omega-3。对食物敏感的宠物通常耐受良好。

ingredients.name: Whitefish Meal
ingredients.explanation: Concentrated fish protein source. Good amino acid profile.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 浓缩鱼类蛋白质来源，氨基酸谱良好。

ingredients.name: Herring
ingredients.explanation: Small oily fish rich in omega-3 fatty acids. Low on the food chain so lower in contaminants.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 小型多脂鱼类，富含omega-3脂肪酸。处于食物链底端，污染物较少。

ingredients.name: Herring Meal
ingredients.explanation: Concentrated herring protein with excellent omega-3 content.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 浓缩鲱鱼蛋白，omega-3含量优秀。

ingredients.name: Herring Oil
ingredients.explanation: Excellent source of omega-3 fatty acids for skin, coat, and cognitive health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: omega-3脂肪酸的优质来源，有益于皮肤、毛发和认知健康。

ingredients.name: Menhaden Fish Meal
ingredients.explanation: High-quality fish meal from menhaden, rich in omega-3s and highly digestible protein.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 优质鱼粉，富含omega-3，蛋白质消化率高。

ingredients.name: Mackerel
ingredients.explanation: Oily fish rich in omega-3 fatty acids, excellent protein source.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 多脂鱼类，富含omega-3脂肪酸，优质蛋白质来源。

ingredients.name: Sardine
ingredients.explanation: Small fish packed with omega-3s and calcium. Low mercury risk.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 小型鱼类，富含omega-3和钙质。汞含量风险低。

ingredients.name: Trout
ingredients.explanation: Quality freshwater fish protein, rich in omega-3 fatty acids.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 优质淡水鱼蛋白质，富含omega-3脂肪酸。

ingredients.name: Cod
ingredients.explanation: Lean white fish protein, highly digestible and low in fat.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 低脂白色鱼肉蛋白，高消化率，脂肪含量低。

ingredients.name: Tuna
ingredients.explanation: Good protein source but may contain higher mercury levels. Best in moderation, especially for cats.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 良好的蛋白质来源，但汞含量可能较高。建议适量食用，尤其是猫。

ingredients.name: Beef
ingredients.explanation: Quality red meat protein, rich in iron, zinc, and B vitamins.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 优质红肉蛋白质，富含铁、锌和B族维生素。

ingredients.name: Beef Meal
ingredients.explanation: Concentrated beef protein source with good amino acid profile.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 浓缩牛肉蛋白来源，氨基酸谱良好。

ingredients.name: Beef Liver
ingredients.explanation: Highly nutritious organ meat rich in vitamin A, iron, and B12.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 高营养内脏肉，富含维生素A、铁和B12。

ingredients.name: Beef Heart
ingredients.explanation: Excellent source of taurine and CoQ10. Quality organ meat.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 牛磺酸和辅酶Q10的优质来源。优质内脏肉。

ingredients.name: Beef Tallow
ingredients.explanation: Rendered beef fat providing essential fatty acids and palatability.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 脂肪酸来源，提供必需脂肪酸和能量。

ingredients.name: Lamb
ingredients.explanation: Quality protein source, often used in limited ingredient diets for sensitive pets.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 优质蛋白质来源，适合对鸡肉或牛肉过敏的宠物。

ingredients.name: Lamb Meal
ingredients.explanation: Concentrated lamb protein. Good alternative for pets with chicken or beef allergies.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 浓缩羊肉蛋白来源，消化率良好。

ingredients.name: Lamb Liver
ingredients.explanation: Nutrient-dense organ meat, natural source of many vitamins and minerals.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 营养丰富的内脏肉，天然维生素和矿物质来源。

ingredients.name: Venison
ingredients.explanation: Novel protein source, lean and nutrient-rich. Great for allergy-prone pets.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 瘦肉型新型蛋白质，适合过敏体质宠物的排除饮食。

ingredients.name: Venison Meal
ingredients.explanation: Concentrated venison protein, excellent for limited ingredient diets.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 浓缩鹿肉蛋白来源，低过敏性蛋白质。

ingredients.name: Bison
ingredients.explanation: Lean, novel protein rich in iron and B12. Often grass-fed with better fatty acid profile.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 瘦肉型新型蛋白质来源，铁含量高。适合对常见蛋白质过敏的宠物。

ingredients.name: Rabbit
ingredients.explanation: Novel, lean protein excellent for pets with multiple food sensitivities.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 瘦肉型新型蛋白质，非常适合有食物敏感性的宠物。

ingredients.name: Wild Boar
ingredients.explanation: Novel protein source, lean and flavorful. Good for rotation diets.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 新型蛋白质来源，适合对常见蛋白质过敏的宠物。

ingredients.name: Pork
ingredients.explanation: Quality protein source rich in thiamine and other B vitamins.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 优质蛋白质来源，富含硫胺素。过敏性低于鸡肉或牛肉。

ingredients.name: Pork Meal
ingredients.explanation: Concentrated pork protein, good amino acid profile.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 浓缩猪肉蛋白来源，氨基酸含量良好。

ingredients.name: Pork Liver
ingredients.explanation: Nutrient-dense organ meat high in vitamin A and iron.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 营养密集的内脏肉，富含铁和B族维生素。

ingredients.name: Pork Fat
ingredients.explanation: Natural fat source providing energy and essential fatty acids.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 脂肪酸来源，提供必需脂肪酸和能量。

ingredients.name: Goat
ingredients.explanation: Novel protein, lean and highly digestible. Excellent for sensitive pets.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 新型蛋白质来源，适合对常见蛋白质过敏的宠物。

ingredients.name: Quail
ingredients.explanation: Novel poultry protein, lean and nutrient-rich.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 瘦肉型优质蛋白质来源。脂肪含量低，消化率高。

ingredients.name: Pheasant
ingredients.explanation: Novel poultry protein with good amino acid profile.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 优质蛋白质来源，提供必需氨基酸。适合猫犬。

ingredients.name: Egg
ingredients.explanation: Complete protein with excellent amino acid profile. Highly digestible.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 完整蛋白质来源，含所有必需氨基酸。高消化率。

ingredients.name: Fish Meal
ingredients.explanation: Generic term - quality varies. Named fish meals (salmon meal, herring meal) are preferred as they identify the specific source.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 浓缩蛋白来源。品质因原料来源不同而异，需关注具体成分标注。

ingredients.name: Fish Oil
ingredients.explanation: Source of omega-3 fatty acids (EPA/DHA). Supports skin, coat, brain, and joint health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: EPA和DHA omega-3脂肪酸来源。支持皮肤、毛发、关节和大脑健康。

ingredients.name: Meat Meal
ingredients.explanation: Unspecified meat source - could come from any animal. Named meat meals are strongly preferred for traceability.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 来源不明确的副产品。品质无法保证，不推荐。

ingredients.name: Meat and Bone Meal
ingredients.explanation: Low-quality rendered product from unspecified animals. May include 4D meats (dead, dying, diseased, disabled). Avoid.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 来源不明确的副产品。品质无法保证，不推荐。

ingredients.name: Animal Fat
ingredients.explanation: Generic, unspecified fat source. Named fats (chicken fat, salmon oil) are preferred for quality and traceability.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 未指明来源的动物脂肪。来源不明确是品质隐忧。

ingredients.name: Animal Digest
ingredients.explanation: Chemically hydrolyzed animal tissue from unspecified sources. Low quality flavor enhancer used in cheap foods.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 来源不明确的副产品。品质无法保证，不推荐。

ingredients.name: Poultry By-Product Meal
ingredients.explanation: Made from poultry parts not typically consumed by humans. Quality varies significantly between manufacturers.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 副产品成分。品质低于明确命名的原料，但仍含一定营养。

ingredients.name: Blood Meal
ingredients.explanation: Dried blood from slaughterhouses. High in protein but poor amino acid balance. Can indicate lower quality food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 副产品成分。品质低于明确命名的原料，但仍含一定营养。

ingredients.name: Feather Meal
ingredients.explanation: Hydrolyzed poultry feathers. Very poorly digestible protein source. Sign of a low-quality food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 副产品成分。品质低于明确命名的原料，但仍含一定营养。

ingredients.name: Brown Rice
ingredients.explanation: Whole grain providing complex carbohydrates, fiber, and B vitamins. Well-tolerated by most pets.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 全谷物，提供复合碳水化合物、纤维和B族维生素。易于消化。

ingredients.name: White Rice
ingredients.explanation: Easily digestible carbohydrate source. Less fiber than brown rice but gentle on sensitive stomachs.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 精制谷物，消化率高但营养价值低于糙米。适合敏感肠胃。

ingredients.name: Oatmeal
ingredients.explanation: Whole grain rich in soluble fiber (beta-glucan). Gentle on digestion and good for skin health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 全谷物碳水化合物来源，富含可溶性纤维。适合多数宠物。

ingredients.name: Barley
ingredients.explanation: Nutritious whole grain with good fiber content. Supports healthy digestion.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 全谷物，富含纤维和B族维生素。良好的碳水化合物来源。

ingredients.name: Quinoa
ingredients.explanation: Complete protein pseudo-grain with all essential amino acids. Highly nutritious and gluten-free.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 完整蛋白质谷物，含所有必需氨基酸。高营养密度。

ingredients.name: Millet
ingredients.explanation: Gluten-free ancient grain, easily digestible. Good source of B vitamins and minerals.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 小型无麸质谷物，消化率良好。提供B族维生素和矿物质。

ingredients.name: Sorghum
ingredients.explanation: Gluten-free grain with good antioxidant content. Provides sustained energy.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 无麸质古老谷物，富含抗氧化剂。良好的碳水化合物替代品。

ingredients.name: Corn
ingredients.explanation: Common filler in lower-quality foods. Some pets have corn sensitivities. Provides energy but less nutritional value than other grains.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 廉价填充成分。虽提供一定能量，但不是宠物食品的理想碳水来源。

ingredients.name: Corn Gluten Meal
ingredients.explanation: Protein extract from corn processing. Used as a cheap protein booster rather than quality nutrition. Can inflate protein percentages.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 玉米加工的蛋白质提取物。用作廉价蛋白质填充剂，非高品质蛋白来源。

ingredients.name: Wheat
ingredients.explanation: Common allergen for pets. Some dogs and cats are sensitive to wheat gluten. Better grain alternatives exist.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 常见过敏原。提供碳水化合物但也是许多宠物的过敏源。

ingredients.name: Wheat Gluten
ingredients.explanation: Plant protein used to boost protein content cheaply. Common allergen. Not a substitute for quality animal protein.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 小麦蛋白提取物。植物蛋白，常用于低质宠物食品增加蛋白质含量。

ingredients.name: Wheat Middlings
ingredients.explanation: Byproduct of wheat flour production (sweepings from milling floor). Low nutritional value filler.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 填充成分。营养价值有限，主要用于降低成本或增加体积。

ingredients.name: Soy
ingredients.explanation: Common allergen and often genetically modified. May cause gas and bloating in some pets. Frequently used as an economical protein source.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 蛋白质填充成分。非高品质蛋白来源，常用于降低成本。

ingredients.name: Soy Protein Concentrate
ingredients.explanation: Processed soy used to boost protein content. Common allergen; not ideal as a primary protein source.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 蛋白质填充成分。非高品质蛋白来源，常用于降低成本。

ingredients.name: Brewers Rice
ingredients.explanation: Small fragments of rice kernels left over from milling. Lower nutritional value than whole rice. Cheap filler.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 碎米粒，碾米的副产品。营养价值低于全粒米。

ingredients.name: Rice Bran
ingredients.explanation: Outer layer of rice grain, good source of fiber, healthy fats, and B vitamins.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 米糠外层，良好的纤维、健康脂肪和B族维生素来源。

ingredients.name: Rice Flour
ingredients.explanation: Finely ground rice, easily digestible carbohydrate source.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 精制米粉，容易消化但纤维含量低。

ingredients.name: Cellulose
ingredients.explanation: Indigestible plant fiber (often from wood pulp). Typically used as a bulk filler with minimal nutritional value.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 木质纤维或植物纤维。仅做填充用途，无营养价值。

ingredients.name: Sweet Potato
ingredients.explanation: Excellent grain-free carbohydrate source rich in beta-carotene, fiber, and vitamins. Gentle on digestion.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 优质无谷碳水化合物来源，富含β-胡萝卜素、纤维和维生素。

ingredients.name: Potato
ingredients.explanation: Common grain-free carbohydrate source. Easily digestible and provides energy.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 碳水化合物来源，无谷配方中常用。血糖指数较高。

ingredients.name: Pea
ingredients.explanation: Good source of plant protein, fiber, and vitamins. Common in grain-free formulas.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 良好的纤维和营养素来源。支持消化健康。

ingredients.name: Pea Protein
ingredients.explanation: Concentrated plant protein used to boost protein percentages cheaply. Overuse can indicate lower meat content.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 蛋白质填充成分。非高品质蛋白来源，常用于降低成本。

ingredients.name: Pea Starch
ingredients.explanation: Starchy extract from peas used as a binding agent and carbohydrate filler.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 填充成分。营养价值有限，主要用于降低成本或增加体积。

ingredients.name: Chickpea
ingredients.explanation: Nutritious legume providing protein, fiber, and complex carbohydrates.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 良好的纤维和营养素来源。支持消化健康。

ingredients.name: Lentil
ingredients.explanation: High-fiber legume rich in protein and minerals. Good grain-free carbohydrate source.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 良好的纤维和营养素来源。支持消化健康。

ingredients.name: Carrot
ingredients.explanation: Excellent source of beta-carotene and fiber. Supports eye health and digestion.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 良好的纤维和营养素来源。支持消化健康。

ingredients.name: Spinach
ingredients.explanation: Nutrient-dense leafy green rich in iron, vitamins, and antioxidants.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 富含铁、维生素和抗氧化剂的绿叶蔬菜。少量使用有益。

ingredients.name: Broccoli
ingredients.explanation: Rich in vitamins C and K, fiber, and cancer-fighting compounds.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 富含维生素C、K和纤维的十字花科蔬菜。适量有益。

ingredients.name: Kale
ingredients.explanation: Superfood vegetable packed with vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 营养密度极高的绿叶蔬菜，富含维生素A、C、K和抗氧化剂。

ingredients.name: Pumpkin
ingredients.explanation: Excellent source of soluble fiber, great for digestive health. Rich in beta-carotene.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 优质纤维和β-胡萝卜素来源。有助于消化健康。

ingredients.name: Butternut Squash
ingredients.explanation: Nutritious squash rich in vitamins A and C, fiber, and potassium.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 良好的纤维和营养素来源。支持消化健康。

ingredients.name: Zucchini
ingredients.explanation: Low-calorie vegetable providing vitamins and hydration.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 蔬菜成分，提供纤维、维生素和矿物质。

ingredients.name: Green Bean
ingredients.explanation: Low-calorie vegetable rich in fiber, vitamins, and minerals.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 良好的纤维和营养素来源。支持消化健康。

ingredients.name: Parsley
ingredients.explanation: Herb with antioxidant properties, supports fresh breath and urinary health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 富含抗氧化剂的蔬菜成分。提供维生素和纤维。

ingredients.name: Kelp
ingredients.explanation: Sea vegetable rich in iodine, minerals, and trace nutrients. Supports thyroid function.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 碘和微量矿物质的天然来源。支持甲状腺功能。

ingredients.name: Alfalfa
ingredients.explanation: Nutrient-rich plant providing chlorophyll, vitamins, and minerals. Supports overall health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 蔬菜成分，提供纤维、维生素和矿物质。

ingredients.name: Tomato Pomace
ingredients.explanation: Byproduct of tomato processing. Good source of soluble fiber and lycopene antioxidant.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 番茄加工副产品，含纤维和番茄红素。并非劣质填充剂。

ingredients.name: Beet Pulp
ingredients.explanation: Moderate fiber source from sugar beets. Supports healthy gut bacteria and stool quality.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 甜菜加工后的纤维。温和的可溶性纤维来源，支持消化健康。

ingredients.name: Apple
ingredients.explanation: Provides fiber, vitamin C, and antioxidants. Seeds are removed for safety.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 提供纤维、维生素C和抗氧化剂。加工时去籽安全。

ingredients.name: Blueberry
ingredients.explanation: Antioxidant-rich superfruit supporting cognitive health and immune function.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 强效抗氧化剂来源，支持认知和免疫健康。优质功能性成分。

ingredients.name: Cranberry
ingredients.explanation: Supports urinary tract health with proanthocyanidins. Rich in antioxidants.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 抗氧化成分，支持泌尿道健康。宠物食品中的有益添加。

ingredients.name: Banana
ingredients.explanation: Good source of potassium, vitamins, and natural prebiotics.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 天然钾和纤维来源。适量有益，但糖分含量高。

ingredients.name: Coconut
ingredients.explanation: Contains medium-chain triglycerides (MCTs) that support brain health and energy.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 含中链脂肪酸，支持皮肤和毛发健康。

ingredients.name: Coconut Oil
ingredients.explanation: Rich in MCTs for quick energy. Supports skin and coat health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 含中链脂肪酸（MCT），支持皮肤和毛发健康。可能有助于认知功能。

ingredients.name: Flaxseed
ingredients.explanation: Excellent plant source of omega-3 (ALA) fatty acids and soluble fiber.
ingredients.explanation_zh: omega-3脂肪酸（ALA）的植物来源。支持皮肤和毛发健康。

ingredients.name: Chia Seed
ingredients.explanation: Rich in omega-3 fatty acids, fiber, and antioxidants.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 富含omega-3脂肪酸、纤维和抗氧化剂。

ingredients.name: Sunflower Oil
ingredients.explanation: Source of omega-6 fatty acids and vitamin E. Supports skin and coat health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: omega-6脂肪酸的来源。支持皮肤和毛发健康。

ingredients.name: Canola Oil
ingredients.explanation: Good balance of omega-3 and omega-6 fatty acids. Low in saturated fat.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 均衡的omega-3和omega-6脂肪酸来源。品质因来源而异。

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.explanation: Rich in monounsaturated fatty acids and polyphenols. Supports heart health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 脂肪酸来源，提供必需脂肪酸和能量。

ingredients.name: Tapioca
ingredients.explanation: Grain-free starch from cassava root. Easily digestible energy source.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 碳水化合物来源，提供能量和部分营养素。

ingredients.name: Glucosamine Hydrochloride
ingredients.explanation: Joint health supplement that supports cartilage formation and repair.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 关节保健补充剂。支持关节灵活性和软骨健康。

ingredients.name: Chondroitin Sulfate
ingredients.explanation: Joint supplement that works with glucosamine to support cartilage and reduce inflammation.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 常与氨基葡萄糖搭配使用的关节保健成分。

ingredients.name: Taurine
ingredients.explanation: Essential amino acid for cats, beneficial for dogs. Critical for heart and eye health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 对猫必需的氨基酸，支持心脏和眼睛健康。对犬也有益。

ingredients.name: L-Carnitine
ingredients.explanation: Amino acid that helps convert fat to energy. Supports heart health and weight management.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 支持脂肪代谢和能量产生的氨基酸。有助于体重管理。

ingredients.name: DL-Methionine
ingredients.explanation: Essential amino acid supporting urinary health and protein synthesis.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 氨基酸补充剂。支持蛋白质合成和身体机能。

ingredients.name: L-Lysine
ingredients.explanation: Essential amino acid supporting immune function and calcium absorption.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 免疫支持补充剂。促进免疫系统正常功能。

ingredients.name: Probiotics
ingredients.explanation: Beneficial bacteria supporting gut health, digestion, and immune function.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 有益肠道菌群，支持消化健康和免疫功能。

ingredients.name: Prebiotics
ingredients.explanation: Non-digestible fibers that feed beneficial gut bacteria. Support digestive health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 消化健康补充剂。支持营养吸收和肠道功能。

ingredients.name: Chicory Root
ingredients.explanation: Natural prebiotic fiber source (inulin) supporting beneficial gut bacteria.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 益生元纤维来源。促进有益肠道菌群生长。

ingredients.name: Yucca Schidigera Extract
ingredients.explanation: Natural extract that reduces stool odor. Also has anti-inflammatory properties.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 天然植物提取物，可减轻粪便异味。

ingredients.name: Green Tea Extract
ingredients.explanation: Antioxidant-rich extract supporting dental health and immune function.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 富含抗氧化剂的天然提取物。支持细胞健康。

ingredients.name: Rosemary Extract
ingredients.explanation: Natural preservative with antioxidant properties. Safe alternative to chemical preservatives.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 具有抗氧化功能的天然防腐剂。安全的化学防腐剂替代品。

ingredients.name: Mixed Tocopherols
ingredients.explanation: Natural vitamin E compounds used as preservatives. Safe and beneficial antioxidant.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 天然维生素E混合物，用作防腐剂。安全有效的抗氧化保鲜剂。

ingredients.name: Citric Acid
ingredients.explanation: Natural preservative derived from citrus fruits. Generally safe in small amounts.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 天然酸味剂和防腐剂。一般公认安全，但过量可能刺激肠胃。

ingredients.name: Ascorbic Acid
ingredients.explanation: Vitamin C - antioxidant supporting immune health. Also used as a natural preservative.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 维生素C（抗坏血酸）。抗氧化剂，支持免疫健康。

ingredients.name: BHA
ingredients.explanation: Butylated hydroxyanisole - synthetic preservative classified by some bodies as a possible concern. FDA-approved for use in pet food at regulated levels. Restricted in some countries for human food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 人工合成抗氧化剂（丁基羟基茴香醚）。部分研究对其安全性提出关注。FDA批准在宠物食品中按规定量使用。

ingredients.name: BHT
ingredients.explanation: Butylated hydroxytoluene - synthetic preservative. Some studies have raised concerns about long-term exposure. FDA-approved for use in pet food at regulated levels.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 人工合成防腐剂（二丁基羟基甲苯）。安全性受到质疑。

ingredients.name: Ethoxyquin
ingredients.explanation: Synthetic antioxidant originally developed as a pesticide. Some studies have raised concerns about long-term exposure. Restricted in some countries for human food; FDA has limited its use in pet food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 合成防腐剂，最初用作农药。部分研究对长期暴露的安全性提出关注。一些国家已对人类食品中的使用进行限制；FDA已限制其在宠物食品中的使用量。

ingredients.name: Sodium Nitrite
ingredients.explanation: Chemical preservative that may form compounds some studies flag as potentially concerning. FDA-approved for use in pet food at regulated levels. Used for color and preservation.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 防腐剂和发色剂。部分研究对其安全性提出关注。FDA批准在宠物食品中按规定量使用。

ingredients.name: Propylene Glycol
ingredients.explanation: Chemical moisturizer. According to veterinary sources, may be harmful to cats (associated with Heinz body anemia). FDA has prohibited its use in cat food. Generally not recommended for pet food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 合成甜味剂和保湿剂。对猫有毒，已被禁止用于猫粮。对犬也存在争议。

ingredients.name: TBHQ
ingredients.explanation: Tertiary butylhydroquinone - synthetic preservative. Some animal studies have raised concerns; FDA-approved for use in pet food at regulated levels.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 人工合成防腐剂。安全性存在严重顾虑，不推荐用于宠物食品。

ingredients.name: Potassium Sorbate
ingredients.explanation: Common preservative that inhibits mold and yeast growth. Generally recognized as safe.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 常用食品防腐剂，一般认为安全。低浓度下风险较低。

ingredients.name: Sodium Bisulfite
ingredients.explanation: Sulfite preservative that can cause allergic reactions in sensitive pets. Some pets tolerate it fine.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 化学防腐剂，可能导致过敏反应。大量食用可能有害。

ingredients.name: Red 40
ingredients.explanation: Artificial dye that some studies have associated with hyperactivity and behavioral issues. Purely cosmetic with no nutritional value. FDA-approved for use in food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 人工色素，部分研究将其与多动和行为问题相关联。FDA批准用于食品。宠物食品中无营养必要性。

ingredients.name: Yellow 5
ingredients.explanation: Artificial dye that some studies have associated with allergic reactions and hyperactivity. No nutritional purpose. FDA-approved for use in food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 人工色素（柠檬黄），可能引发过敏反应。纯粹为视觉效果添加。

ingredients.name: Yellow 6
ingredients.explanation: Artificial dye that some studies have associated with allergic reactions. Some regulatory bodies have raised concerns. Purely cosmetic. FDA-approved for use in food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 人工色素（日落黄），部分研究将其与过敏和行为问题相关联。FDA批准用于食品。无营养用途。

ingredients.name: Blue 2
ingredients.explanation: Artificial dye with no nutritional benefit. Some animal studies have raised concerns. FDA-approved for use in food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 人工色素（靛蓝），对宠物无营养益处。部分动物研究对其安全性提出关注。FDA批准用于食品。

ingredients.name: Red 3
ingredients.explanation: Artificial dye flagged by some regulatory bodies as a possible concern for thyroid health. Restricted in cosmetics but FDA-approved for use in food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 人工色素。对宠物无营养价值，纯为外观添加。不推荐。

ingredients.name: Titanium Dioxide
ingredients.explanation: White colorant classified by some bodies as a possible concern when inhaled. Restricted in EU food products; FDA-approved for use in pet food. No nutritional purpose.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 白色着色剂。纯为外观添加，对宠物营养无益。安全性存疑。

ingredients.name: Caramel Color
ingredients.explanation: Artificial coloring with no nutritional value. Some forms may contain 4-MEI, which some studies have flagged as potentially concerning. FDA-approved for use in food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 加工着色剂。某些类型可能含有4-甲基咪唑，部分研究对此成分提出关注。FDA批准用于食品。

ingredients.name: Iron Oxide
ingredients.explanation: Natural mineral colorant. Generally considered safe but adds no nutritional value as a colorant.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 矿物着色剂。虽然毒性低，但在宠物食品中不必要。

ingredients.name: Sugar
ingredients.explanation: Added sugar has no place in pet food. Contributes to obesity, dental problems, and diabetes.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 添加糖在宠物食品中毫无必要。导致肥胖、糖尿病和牙齿问题。

ingredients.name: Corn Syrup
ingredients.explanation: Cheap sweetener contributing to obesity and diabetes. Used to make low-quality food palatable and addictive.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 高度加工的甜味剂。导致肥胖和糖尿病。宠物食品中不应出现。

ingredients.name: Molasses
ingredients.explanation: Natural sweetener with some minerals. Better than sugar but still unnecessary in most pet foods.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 含糖量高的甜味剂。少量可接受但非必需成分。

ingredients.name: Sorbitol
ingredients.explanation: Sugar alcohol that can cause digestive upset (gas, diarrhea) in pets. Unnecessary additive.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 糖醇类甜味剂。过量食用可导致胃肠不适和腹泻。

ingredients.name: Xylitol
ingredients.explanation: Widely recognized by veterinary authorities as very harmful to dogs. According to veterinary sources, even small amounts may cause hypoglycemia and liver failure. Should be avoided in pet food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 兽医界广泛认为对犬有害的糖醇。据兽医来源，即使少量也可能导致低血糖和肝脏问题。应避免用于宠物食品。

ingredients.name: Glycerin
ingredients.explanation: Humectant that keeps semi-moist foods soft. Vegetable glycerin is safe in moderate amounts.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 保湿剂，使半湿粮保持柔软。植物甘油一般安全。

ingredients.name: Guar Gum
ingredients.explanation: Natural thickener from guar beans. Generally safe and provides some soluble fiber.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 瓜尔豆天然增稠剂。一般安全，提供一定可溶性纤维。

ingredients.name: Xanthan Gum
ingredients.explanation: Natural thickener produced by bacterial fermentation. Safe in small amounts used in pet food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 发酵产生的增稠剂。少量使用一般安全。

ingredients.name: Carrageenan
ingredients.explanation: Seaweed-derived thickener. Some studies have associated it with gastrointestinal inflammation, though this remains debated among researchers. FDA-approved for use in food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 海藻提取增稠剂。部分研究将其与肠道炎症相关联，但在研究者中仍有争议。FDA批准用于食品。

ingredients.name: Agar-Agar
ingredients.explanation: Natural seaweed-derived gelling agent. Safe and provides some fiber.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 海藻提取的天然凝胶剂。安全的增稠剂替代品。

ingredients.name: Locust Bean Gum
ingredients.explanation: Natural thickener from carob tree seeds. Safe and well-tolerated.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 角豆树天然增稠剂。安全且耐受性良好。

ingredients.name: Cassia Gum
ingredients.explanation: Natural gelling agent from cassia seeds. Used as a thickener in wet pet foods.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 决明子天然增稠剂。一般安全，用于湿粮质地调节。

ingredients.name: Sodium Tripolyphosphate
ingredients.explanation: Used for dental tartar control in kibble. Generally safe in small amounts but is a chemical additive.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 用于控制牙结石的磷酸盐。大量食用可能引起消化问题。

ingredients.name: Calcium Carbonate
ingredients.explanation: Natural calcium supplement supporting bone and teeth health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 钙质补充剂。支持骨骼和牙齿健康。

ingredients.name: Calcium Phosphate
ingredients.explanation: Calcium and phosphorus supplement for bone health. Common in balanced pet foods.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 钙质补充剂。支持骨骼和牙齿健康。

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.explanation: Necessary in small amounts but excessive salt is harmful. Should not appear in the first few ingredients.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 矿物质补充剂。满足宠物必需矿物质需求。

ingredients.name: Potassium Chloride
ingredients.explanation: Potassium supplement supporting heart, muscle, and nerve function.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 钾补充剂。支持心脏功能和肌肉收缩。

ingredients.name: Zinc Sulfate
ingredients.explanation: Zinc supplement supporting immune function, skin health, and wound healing.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 锌补充剂。支持免疫功能、皮肤和毛发健康。

ingredients.name: Zinc Proteinate
ingredients.explanation: Chelated zinc supplement with superior absorption. Supports skin, coat, and immune health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 锌补充剂。支持免疫功能、皮肤和毛发健康。

ingredients.name: Iron Proteinate
ingredients.explanation: Chelated iron supplement with good bioavailability. Supports oxygen transport in blood.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 铁质补充剂。支持血红蛋白生成和氧气运输。

ingredients.name: Ferrous Sulfate
ingredients.explanation: Iron supplement supporting red blood cell production and oxygen transport.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 铁质补充剂。支持血红蛋白生成和氧气运输。

ingredients.name: Copper Sulfate
ingredients.explanation: Copper supplement supporting enzyme function, iron metabolism, and connective tissue.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 铁质补充剂。支持血红蛋白生成和氧气运输。

ingredients.name: Copper Proteinate
ingredients.explanation: Chelated copper with enhanced absorption. Supports multiple enzymatic processes.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 铜补充剂。支持铁吸收和结缔组织形成。

ingredients.name: Manganese Sulfate
ingredients.explanation: Manganese supplement supporting bone formation and metabolic processes.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 锰补充剂。支持骨骼发育和代谢功能。

ingredients.name: Manganese Proteinate
ingredients.explanation: Chelated manganese with superior bioavailability. Supports bone and cartilage health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 锰补充剂。支持骨骼发育和代谢功能。

ingredients.name: Selenium
ingredients.explanation: Essential trace mineral supporting thyroid function and antioxidant defense.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 硒补充剂。抗氧化矿物质，支持免疫和甲状腺功能。

ingredients.name: Sodium Selenite
ingredients.explanation: Inorganic selenium supplement. Less bioavailable than organic forms but still effective.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 硒补充剂。抗氧化矿物质，支持免疫和甲状腺功能。

ingredients.name: Iodine
ingredients.explanation: Essential mineral for thyroid hormone production and metabolic regulation.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 碘补充剂。支持甲状腺功能正常运作。

ingredients.name: Cobalt
ingredients.explanation: Trace mineral essential as part of vitamin B12. Supports red blood cell formation.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 钴补充剂。维生素B12合成所需微量矿物质。

ingredients.name: Magnesium
ingredients.explanation: Essential mineral supporting muscle, nerve, and bone function.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 镁补充剂。支持肌肉和神经功能。

ingredients.name: Phosphorus
ingredients.explanation: Essential mineral for bone health, energy metabolism, and cell function.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 磷补充剂。支持骨骼和牙齿健康。

ingredients.name: Vitamin A
ingredients.explanation: Essential vitamin supporting vision, immune function, and skin health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 维生素A补充剂。支持视力、免疫和皮肤健康。

ingredients.name: Vitamin B1
ingredients.explanation: Thiamine - essential for carbohydrate metabolism and nervous system function.
ingredients.explanation_zh: B族维生素补充剂。支持能量代谢和神经功能。

ingredients.name: Vitamin B2
ingredients.explanation: Riboflavin - supports energy metabolism and cellular function.
ingredients.explanation_zh: B族维生素补充剂。支持能量代谢和神经功能。

ingredients.name: Vitamin B3
ingredients.explanation: Niacin - essential for energy metabolism, skin health, and nervous system function.
ingredients.explanation_zh: B族维生素补充剂。支持能量代谢和神经功能。

ingredients.name: Vitamin B5
ingredients.explanation: Pantothenic acid - supports adrenal function and energy metabolism.
ingredients.explanation_zh: B族维生素补充剂。支持能量代谢和神经功能。

ingredients.name: Vitamin B6
ingredients.explanation: Pyridoxine - essential for protein metabolism, nervous system, and red blood cell formation.
ingredients.explanation_zh: B族维生素补充剂。支持能量代谢和神经功能。

ingredients.name: Vitamin B7
ingredients.explanation: Biotin - supports skin, coat, and nail health. Important for fatty acid metabolism.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 维生素补充剂。满足宠物日常营养需求。

ingredients.name: Vitamin B9
ingredients.explanation: Folic acid - essential for DNA synthesis, cell division, and red blood cell formation.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 维生素补充剂。满足宠物日常营养需求。

ingredients.name: Vitamin B12
ingredients.explanation: Cobalamin - essential for nervous system function, red blood cell formation, and DNA synthesis.
ingredients.explanation_zh: B族维生素补充剂。支持能量代谢和神经功能。

ingredients.name: Vitamin C
ingredients.explanation: Antioxidant supporting immune health. Dogs produce their own but supplementation can be beneficial.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 维生素C（抗坏血酸）。抗氧化剂，支持免疫健康。

ingredients.name: Vitamin D3
ingredients.explanation: Essential for calcium absorption and bone health. Must be supplemented as pets produce limited amounts.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 维生素D补充剂。支持钙吸收和骨骼健康。

ingredients.name: Vitamin E
ingredients.explanation: Powerful antioxidant supporting immune function, skin health, and cell protection.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 维生素E补充剂。强效抗氧化剂，支持免疫和皮肤健康。

ingredients.name: Vitamin K
ingredients.explanation: Essential for blood clotting and bone metabolism.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 维生素K补充剂。支持血液凝固和骨骼健康。

ingredients.name: Menadione Sodium Bisulfite Complex
ingredients.explanation: Synthetic vitamin K supplement (K3). Some concerns about toxicity at high doses. Natural K1 is preferred.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 维生素K补充剂。支持血液凝固和骨骼健康。

ingredients.name: Choline Chloride
ingredients.explanation: Essential nutrient supporting liver function, brain development, and fat metabolism.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 维生素补充剂。满足宠物日常营养需求。

ingredients.name: Inositol
ingredients.explanation: B-vitamin-like nutrient supporting cell membrane health and fat metabolism.
ingredients.explanation_zh: B族维生素补充剂。支持能量代谢和神经功能。

ingredients.name: Natural Flavor
ingredients.explanation: Flavoring derived from natural sources. Generally safe though the specific source is often unspecified.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 天然调味剂。来源于天然原料，一般安全。

ingredients.name: Artificial Flavor
ingredients.explanation: Synthetic flavoring chemicals with no nutritional value. Indicates low-quality food that needs flavor masking.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 调味成分。用于提升食品适口性。

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.explanation: According to veterinary sources, may be harmful to dogs and cats in large amounts (associated with oxidative damage to red blood cells). Small amounts in food are debated among experts.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 食品添加剂。安全性存在一定争议。

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.explanation: Widely recognized by veterinary authorities as harmful to dogs and cats. According to veterinary sources, may cause hemolytic anemia by damaging red blood cells. Should be avoided in pet food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 人工添加剂。安全性存在严重顾虑，不推荐。

ingredients.name: Grapes
ingredients.explanation: Widely recognized by veterinary authorities as harmful to dogs. According to veterinary sources, may cause acute kidney failure. Recent research has identified tartaric acid as a compound of concern. Should be avoided in pet food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 天然水果成分，提供维生素、纤维和抗氧化剂。

ingredients.name: Chocolate
ingredients.explanation: Widely recognized by veterinary authorities as harmful to dogs and cats. Contains theobromine, which according to veterinary sources, pets have difficulty metabolizing. Should be avoided in pet food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 人工添加剂。安全性存在严重顾虑，不推荐。

ingredients.name: Avocado
ingredients.explanation: Contains persin, which according to some sources may be harmful to certain animals. The flesh is generally considered safer than skin/pit but still debated for pets.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 天然水果成分，提供维生素、纤维和抗氧化剂。

ingredients.name: Macadamia Nut
ingredients.explanation: Widely recognized by veterinary authorities as harmful to dogs. According to veterinary sources, may cause weakness, vomiting, tremors, and hyperthermia. Should be avoided in pet food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 人工添加剂。安全性存在严重顾虑，不推荐。

ingredients.name: Nutmeg
ingredients.explanation: Contains myristicin, which according to veterinary sources may be harmful to pets. Some sources associate it with adverse neurological effects. Should be avoided in pet food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 人工添加剂。安全性存在严重顾虑，不推荐。

ingredients.name: Turmeric
ingredients.explanation: Anti-inflammatory spice with curcumin. Supports joint health and has antioxidant properties.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 含姜黄素的天然抗炎成分。支持关节和消化健康。

ingredients.name: Ginger
ingredients.explanation: Natural anti-nausea and anti-inflammatory ingredient. Supports digestive health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 消化健康补充剂。支持营养吸收和肠道功能。

ingredients.name: Cinnamon
ingredients.explanation: Small amounts may be beneficial (anti-inflammatory) but excessive amounts can be harmful due to coumarin content.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 食品添加剂。安全性存在一定争议。

ingredients.name: Peppermint
ingredients.explanation: Supports digestive health and freshens breath. Safe in small amounts used in pet food.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 食品添加剂。用于改善食品品质或加工性能。

ingredients.name: Flaxseed Oil
ingredients.explanation: Rich plant source of omega-3 (ALA) fatty acids supporting skin and coat health.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 植物性omega-3来源。支持皮肤和毛发健康。

ingredients.name: Hemp Seed
ingredients.explanation: Complete plant protein with ideal omega-3 to omega-6 ratio. Supports skin and coat.
ingredients.explanation_zh: 必需脂肪酸补充剂。支持皮肤、毛发和整体健康。

ingredients.name: Spirulina
